name: Aegean Artichoke & Penne Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons fresh basil, or 1 teaspoon dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from artichokes and peel off the tough outer leaves to reveal yellow-green hearts. Cut artichokes into quarters.
- Combine 1/4 cup lemon juice with 2 cups water in a medium bowl.
- Add artichokes to the lemon water mixture and toss gently to prevent discoloration.
- Drain the artichokes and chill.
2. Bring 2 quarts of water to a rapid boil in a large pot. Add 1 teaspoon salt and penne pasta.
- Cook penne until al dente, about 10 minutes.
- Drain and rinse with cold water.
3. To make salad dressing:
- Combine tomato juice, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, parsley, basil, salt, and pepper in a food processor or blender.
- Puree for 30 seconds.
4. Toss together artichokes, penne, capers, olives, and feta cheese in a large bowl salad bowl.
- Pour dressing over the mixture and toss well.
